examples: The dusky water of the Yongding remained behind them, flashing and dancing in the yellow rays of the westering sun.
The Card Room seems to speak of a thousand games of whist and bridge and the Gold Room, especially as the westering sun burnishes its teak ceiling, is the ideal place for a pre-dinner sherry.
Bradley Davies, 18, of Westering, in Ditherington, Shrewsbury, admitted being involved in the attack on Ben Bebbington but had blamed his co-accused Stewart Doran.
